# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: "/tmp/admin_access.log"
  address:
    socket_address: 
      address: "0.0.0.0"
      port_value: 9901
  router_config:
    stat_prefix: "admin"
    route_config_name: "local_route"
  http_filters:
  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
  stat_sinks:
    name: envoy.stat_sinks.statsd
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.metrics.v2.StatsSink
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: "127.0.0.1"
          port_value: 8125
  tracing:
    http: 
      name: envoy.tracers.zipkin
      typed_config:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.trace.v2.ZipkinConfig
        collector_cluster: zipkin
        collector_endpoint: "/api/v1/spans"
        collector_endpoint_version: HTTP_JSON
